title: Pineapple Russian Indulgent Delight
description: A rich dessert featuring a caramelized pineapple filling, topped with a creamy Russian-inspired cream and crunchy indulgent bites.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the molten chocolate over low heat.
In a separate bowl, mix the Russian cream cheese, granulated sugar, and heavy cream until smooth.
Fold in the crushed indulgent bites.
Arrange the diced pineapple on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the molten chocolate over the pineapple.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pineapple is caramelized.
Remove from oven and top with the Russian cream cheese mixture.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
